prompt: A sits immediately to the right of B.
explanation: A must be exactly one position to the right of B.
hints: Place B first as the reference.
A must go on the immediate right side of B.
There must be no empty slot between B and A.

prompt: P sits third to the left of Q.
explanation: P must be three positions to the left of Q.
hints: Place Q as the reference.
Move three positions left from Q.
Put P on that slot.

prompt: R sits second to the right of S.
explanation: R is two positions to S's right. The absolute slots do not matter, only the relationship.
hints: S is the reference.
Count two positions toward the right.
Place R there.

prompt: Three persons sit between A and B.
explanation: Three positions strictly between A and B means their positions differ by four.
hints: Either A or B can be on the left.
Leave exactly three slots between the two tokens.
The endpoint positions must differ by four.

prompt: M sits fourth to the left of N.
explanation: M must be four positions to the left of N.
hints: N is the reference.
Move four slots left from N.
Place M there.

prompt: No person sits between C and D.
explanation: No person between them means C and D are adjacent. Either left-right order is valid.
hints: Order is not specified.
The two tokens must touch neighboring slots.
Place them with zero slots between.

prompt: X sits fifth to the left of Y.
explanation: X must be exactly five positions to the left of Y.
hints: Y is the reference.
Count five slots to the left.
Place X on the fifth slot.

prompt: Exactly two persons sit between P and Q.
explanation: Two people between P and Q means the endpoint positions differ by three.
hints: Either token may be on the left.
Leave exactly two slots between them.
Their positions differ by three.

prompt: K sits third to the right of L.
explanation: K must be three positions to the right of L.
hints: L is the reference person.
Move three slots right from L.
Place K there.

prompt: Five persons sit between H and J.
explanation: Five positions strictly between H and J creates a positional distance of six.
hints: The order of H and J is not fixed.
Leave five slots strictly between them.
Their slot numbers must differ by six.

prompt: B is seventh to the left of A.
explanation: B must be seven positions to the left of A.
hints: A is the reference.
Move seven positions toward the left.
Place B there.

prompt: Exactly six seats lie strictly between T and U.
explanation: Six slots strictly between T and U means their positions differ by seven.
hints: Either order is valid.
Leave six empty slots between the tokens.
The endpoint distance is seven.
